---
title: "mulvar"
author: "164221063_I Made Dharma Satya Mulyawan"
date: "2024-09-10"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Install necessary packages if not already installed
if(!require(Hotelling)) install.packages("Hotelling")

# Load the required libraries
library(Hotelling)

# Path to the CSV file
file_path <- 'C:/Users/Acer/Downloads/archive (5)/employee_survey.csv'

# Read the CSV data
employee_survey <- read.csv(file_path)

# Filter data based on gender
data_female <- subset(employee_survey, Gender == 'Female')
data_male <- subset(employee_survey, Gender == 'Male')

# Select only the columns for PhysicalActivityHours, SleepHours, and Experience
data_female_values <- data_female[, c("PhysicalActivityHours", "SleepHours", "Experience")]
data_male_values <- data_male[, c("PhysicalActivityHours", "SleepHours", "Experience")]

# Convert the data to matrix format
data_female_matrix <- as.matrix(data_female_values)
data_male_matrix <- as.matrix(data_male_values)

# Perform Hotelling's T² test
result <- hotelling.test(data_female_matrix, data_male_matrix)

# Print the result
print(result)

```
